title: Pouvoirs

pages.text:
WHEREAS for the purpose of concluding

and signing an Agreement between the Government of Malta and the Government of the Republic of

France relative to Cultural Co-operation it is expedient that a fit person should be invested with Full Power to conclude and sign the said

Agreement on the part of the Government of Malta;

I, GIORGIO BORG OLIVIER, Minister of Commonwealth and Foreign Affairs, do hereby certify that Mr

Frederick Edgar Amato-Gauci, Secretary, Ministry of Commonwealth and Foreign Affairs, is by these

Presents named, constituted and appointed as

Plenipotentiary and Representative having Full power and Authority to conclude and sign the aforesaid Agreement for the Government of Malta.

signed and pate a valetta chla encha day of Zebruary one t

One thousand Nine hundred anc

Sixty-eight.
